What was your favorite part of distance: School being more efficient and giving more freedom
What was your least favorite part of dis: The lack of engagement made it harder to retain anything learned

What was your favorite part of distance: Because I wasn't in class where the instructor could see me I was able to do other things to keep physically busy while listening to lectures, which I find often helps me listen, and it gave me so much more time to do things I love doing for fun during typical school/work hours.
What was your least favorite part of dis: I missed going to the library and the in-person discussion. Discussion boards just aren't the same
Lack of connection to class, hard to focus, lack of structure
Being away from an environment where it was completely dedicated to study
Not seeing my friends as much
Not seeing my friends as often.

What was your favorite part of distance: Being more on my own schedule - I could go as quickly or slowly as I desired most of the time.
What was your least favorite part of dis: My least favorite part was readjusting to learning in person again - I had to shake off the bad and often lazy habits that I had developed as a part of distance learning.
